        refine hM.toIsMatching.indep.base_of_maximal (fun J hJ hsub ↦ eq_of_subset_of_encard_le hsub ?_ hM.toIsMatching.finite_vertices)
        rw [hM.encard]; exact hJ.isMatching.isMaxMatching_of_vertex_subset rfl.subset |>.encard.le
      exact ⟨_, hB, hy⟩

set M := G.matchingMatroid
  have hx : ¬ M.IsColoop x := matchingMatroid.noColoop h_all hadj.mem_V_left
  have hy : ¬ M.IsColoop y := matchingMatroid.noColoop h_all hadj.mem_V_right
  have hne : x ≠ y := hadj.ne

  rw [Matroid.series_iff_cocircuit hne, Matroid.isCocircuit_iff_minimal_intersects_base]
  refine ⟨fun B hB ↦ ?_, fun K hK hsub ↦ ?_⟩
  · by_contra hdisj
    rw [disjoint_iff_inter_eq_empty] at hdisj
    obtain ⟨M', hM', hBsub⟩ := hB.indep
    have hM'B : V(G, M') = B :=
      hBsub.antisymm (M.indep_maximal hB (G.matchingIndepMatroid.indep_iff.2 ⟨M', hM', rfl.subset⟩) hBsub)
    rw [← hM'B] at hdisj
    have h_aug : G.IsMatching (insert hadj.edge M') := by
      refine ⟨insert_subset hadj.mem_edge hM'.subset, fun e he f hf hne ↦ ?_⟩
      rw [mem_insert_iff] at he hf
      obtain (rfl | he) := he <;> obtain (rfl | hf) := hf
      · contradiction
      · rw [hadj.V_edge_eq]; exact disjoint_sdiff_left.mono_right (hdisj.trans (diff_subset ..))
      · rw [hadj.V_edge_eq]; exact disjoint_sdiff_right.mono_left (hdisj.trans (diff_subset ..))
      · exact hM'.disjoint he hf hne
    have h_indep := G.matchingIndepMatroid.indep_iff.2 ⟨_, h_aug, rfl.subset⟩
    have h_card : B.encard < (V(G, insert hadj.edge M')).encard := by
      rw [← hM'B, hadj.V_edge_eq, V_insert, encard_insert_of_not_mem (by simp [hdisj]),
        encard_insert_of_not_mem (by simp [hdisj, hne])]
      exact ENat.lt_add_one (B.encard) (by simp)
    exact h_indep.not_mem_base_of_encard_lt hB h_card
  · obtain ⟨z, hzK⟩ := hK
    have hz : z ∈ ({x, y} : Set α) := hsub hzK
    simp only [mem_insert_iff, mem_singleton_iff] at hz
    obtain (rfl | rfl) := hz
    · exact (hx (Matroid.isColoop_iff_forall_mem_base.2 (fun B hB ↦ 
        singleton_inter_nonempty.1 (hK.trans (insert_subset_insert (subset_singleton_iff.2 rfl)) B hB)))).elim
    · exact (hy (Matroid.isColoop_iff_forall_mem_base.2 (fun B hB ↦ 
        singleton_inter_nonempty.1 (hK.trans (singleton_subset_iff.2 (hsub hzK)) B hB)))).elim

obtain ⟨e, he⟩ := h_adj
  have hne := he.ne
  have hx := he.mem_vert_left
  have hy := he.mem_vert_right
  rw [Matroid.series_iff_isCocircuit, Matroid.isCocircuit_iff_isHyperplane_compl]
  have h_eq : G.matchingMatroid.E \ (G.matchingMatroid.E \ {x, y}) = {x, y} := by
    simp [matchingMatroid, matchingIndepMatroid, hx, hy, hne]
  rw [h_eq]
  refine ⟨?_, ?_⟩
  · intro h_span
    obtain ⟨I, hI⟩ := G.matchingMatroid.exists_basis_subset_isSpanning h_span
    obtain ⟨M, hM, rfl⟩ := (G.matchingIndepMatroid.matroid_indep_iff _).mp hI.indep
    let M_new := M ∪ {e}
    have hM_new : G.IsMatching M_new := by
      refine ⟨insert_subset he.mem_edge hM.subset, ?_⟩
      intro f hf g hg hfg
      simp only [mem_insert_iff, mem_singleton_iff] at hf hg
      obtain rfl | hf := hf <;> obtain rfl | hg := hg
      · contradiction
      · have : V(G, g) ⊆ V(G, M) := G.subset_verts_of_mem_edge hM hg
        have : Disjoint V(G, e) V(G, M) := by
          rw [disjoint_iff_inter_eq_empty, subset_empty_iff]
          intro v ⟨hv1, hv2⟩
          rw [he.verts_eq] at hv1
          exact (hI.subset hv2).2 (by simp [hv1])
        exact Disjoint.disjoint_vertices he.1 hg hfg (this.symm.mono_left (by rw [he.verts_eq]; simp))
      · have : V(G, f) ⊆ V(G, M) := G.subset_verts_of_mem_edge hM hf
        have : Disjoint V(G, e) V(G, M) := by
          rw [disjoint_iff_inter_eq_empty, subset_empty_iff]
          intro v ⟨hv1, hv2⟩
          rw [he.verts_eq] at hv1
          exact (hI.subset hv2).2 (by simp [hv1])
        exact Disjoint.disjoint_vertices hf he.1 hfg (this.mono_right (by rw [he.verts_eq]; simp))
      · exact hM.disjoint hf hg hfg
    have h_indep := (G.matchingIndepMatroid.matroid_indep_iff _).mpr ⟨M_new, hM_new, rfl.subset⟩
    have h_ss : V(G, M) ⊆ V(G, M_new) := fun v hv ↦ mem_union_left _ hv
    have h_x_mem : x ∈ V(G, M_new) := by
      apply mem_union_right
      rw [he.verts_eq]
      simp
    rw [← hI.eq_of_subset_indep h_indep h_ss] at h_x_mem
    exact (hI.subset h_x_mem).2 (mem_singleton_iff.mpr rfl)
  · intro f hf
    rw [mem_diff, not_and, not_not] at hf
    have hf_in : f ∈ {x, y} := hf (by apply Matroid.subset_ground)
    simp only [mem_insert_iff, mem_singleton_iff] at hf_in
    rcases hf_in with rfl | rfl
    · convert (matchingMatroid.noColoop h_in hy).isSpanning_compl
      simp [hne, diff_diff, insert_diff_singleton, insert_eq_of_mem]
    · convert (matchingMatroid.noColoop h_in hx).isSpanning_compl
      simp [hne, diff_diff, insert_diff_singleton, insert_eq_of_mem, union_comm]

set M := G.matchingMatroid
  have hne : x ≠ y := h_adj.ne
  have hx : ¬ M.IsColoop x := matchingMatroid.noColoop h_iness x h_adj.fst_mem
  have hy : ¬ M.IsColoop y := matchingMatroid.noColoop h_iness y h_adj.snd_mem
  rw [Matroid.series_iff_dual_parallel hx hy, Matroid.parallel_iff_circuit _ hne (by simpa) (by simpa),
    Matroid.dual_circuit_iff_cocircuit]
  apply Matroid.cocircuit_of_rank_eq_sub_one hne
  · simp [matchingMatroid.noColoop_iff_rank_eq, hx, hy]
  · apply le_antisymm
    · rw [M.le_eRk_iff]
      rintro I ⟨⟨m, hm, hIm⟩, hIs⟩
      by_contra hlt
      rw [not_lt] at hlt
      obtain ⟨mx, hmx, -⟩ := h_iness x
      have hrk : M.eRank = mx.encard * 2 := by
        refine le_antisymm (M.eRank_le_of_forall_indep fun J ⟨m', hm', hJ⟩ ↦
          (encard_le_encard hJ).trans (hm'.encard_le.trans (hmx.max _ hm'.isMaxMatching_of_vertex_subset (subset_refl _))))
          (M.eRk_le_eRank_of_indep ⟨mx, hmx.toIsMatching, subset_refl _⟩)
      have hsz : m.encard = mx.encard := by
        have := (encard_le_encard hIm).trans_eq hlt |>.trans hrk
        rw [encard_graph_eq_two_mul_encard_edge] at this
        exact le_antisymm (hm.encard_le.trans (hmx.max _ hm.isMaxMatching_of_vertex_subset (subset_refl _)))
          (ENat.mul_le_mul_right_iff (by decide) |>.1 this)
      have hIm_eq : V(G, m) = I := by
        refine subset_antisymm ?_ hIm
        rw [encard_graph_eq_two_mul_encard_edge, hsz, ← hrk]
        exact (encard_le_encard hIm).trans_eq hlt |>.antisymm_of_le (encard_le_encard hIm)
      have h_miss : x ∉ V(G, m) ∧ y ∉ V(G, m) := by
        rw [hIm_eq]; exact ⟨fun h ↦ (hIs h).1 rfl, fun h ↦ (hIs h).2 rfl⟩
      refine (⟨hm, fun M' hM' ↦ by rw [hsz]; exact hM'.encard_le⟩ : G.IsMaxMatching m).max
        (insert (G.edgeOfAdj h_adj) m) ?_ (by simp) |>.not_lt (by simp)
      exact ⟨insert_subset (h_adj.mem_edge) hm.subset,
        hm.disjoint_insert (h_adj.edgeOfAdj_src_mem_vertices) (h_adj.edgeOfAdj_tgt_mem_vertices) h_miss.1 h_miss.2 hne⟩
    · obtain ⟨mx, hmx, hxm⟩ := h_iness x
      refine (M.eRk_ge_of_subset_indep (diff_subset _ _) (M.indep_of_subset_indep 
        ⟨mx, hmx.toIsMatching, subset_refl _⟩ (diff_subset _ _))).trans ?_
      rw [encard_diff_singleton_add_one (by simpa using hmx.toIsMatching.subset_ground y)]
      exact (matchingMatroid.noColoop_iff_rank_eq.1 hx).symm.trans_le <|
        M.eRk_le_of_subset_indep (by simpa using hxm) ⟨mx, hmx.toIsMatching, subset_refl _⟩

set M := G.matchingMatroid
  have hne : x ≠ y := hadj.ne
  rw [M.series_iff_isCocircuit hne, M.isCocircuit_iff_isHyperplane_compl]
  refine M.isHyperplane_of_eRk_eq_sub_one_of_forall_insert ?_ (fun e he ↦ ?_)
  · have h_lt : M.eRk (V(G) \ {x, y}) < M.eRank := by
      intro h_eq
      obtain ⟨B, hB, hBsub⟩ := M.exists_isBasis_of_eRk_eq_eRank (diff_subset _ _) h_eq
      obtain ⟨m, hm, rfl⟩ := hB.indep
      obtain ⟨e, he⟩ := hadj
      have : G.IsMatching (insert e m) :=
        { subset := insert_subset he hm.subset
          disjoint := by
            rintro f hf g hg hne
            simp only [mem_insert_iff] at hf hg
            obtain (rfl | hf) := hf <;> obtain (rfl | hg) := hg
            · contradiction
            · refine Disjoint.symm (disjoint_of_subset_right (by simp) (disjoint_of_subset_left (hBsub hg) disjoint_sdiff_left))
            · refine disjoint_of_subset_right (by simp) (disjoint_of_subset_left (hBsub hf) disjoint_sdiff_left)
            · exact hm.disjoint hf hg hne }
      exact (hm.max _ this).not_lt (by simp; exact ENat.lt_add_one _)

    have h_ge : M.eRank ≤ M.eRk (V(G) \ {x, y}) + 1 := by
      obtain ⟨mx, hmx, hx⟩ := h_in x
      by_cases hy : y ∈ V(G, mx)
      · have : M.Indep (V(G, mx) \ {y}) := (M.indep_of_isMaxMatching hmx).subset (diff_subset _ _)
        rw [← hmx.encard, ← encard_diff_singleton_add_one hy]
        exact add_le_add_right (M.le_eRk_of_indep ⟨_, this.of_matching, (subset_diff.mpr ⟨subset_rfl, by simp [hx, hne]⟩)⟩) _
      · refine (h_lt.ne (le_antisymm (M.eRk_le_eRank _) ?_)).elim
        trans mx.encard
        · rw [hmx.encard]
        · exact M.le_eRk_of_indep (M.indep_of_subset_isMaxMatching hmx (subset_diff.mpr ⟨subset_rfl, disjoint_insert_right.mpr ⟨hx, hy⟩⟩))
    exact le_antisymm (ENat.le_sub_one_of_lt h_lt) (ENat.sub_one_le_of_le_add_one h_ge)

  · simp only [mem_diff, mem_singleton_iff, not_and, not_not] at he
    obtain (rfl | rfl) := he (mem_ground_of_mem_compl he)
    · rw [insert_diff_singleton, insert_eq_of_mem (mem_diff_of_not (by simp) hne)]
      exact (M.eRk_eq_eRank_iff_not_isColoop.mpr (matchingMatroid.noColoop h_in y)).symm
    · rw [insert_diff_singleton_comm hne.symm, insert_eq_of_mem (mem_diff_of_not (by simp) hne.symm)]
      exact (M.eRk_eq_eRank_iff_not_isColoop.mpr (matchingMatroid.noColoop h_in x)).symm

have hne : x ≠ y := by
    rintro rfl
    obtain ⟨e, he⟩ := h_adj
    obtain ⟨M, hM, hnot⟩ := h_in x
    have hMe : G.IsMatching (insert e M)
    · refine ⟨insert_subset he.mem_edge hM.subset, ?_⟩
      simp only [mem_insert_iff, forall_eq_or_imp, ne_eq]
      exact ⟨fun _ h ↦ (hnot <| h.symm ▸ he.mem_vertex_left).elim, fun f hf ↦
        ⟨fun h ↦ (hnot <| h ▸ he.mem_vertex_left).elim, fun _ ↦ hM.disjoint hf⟩⟩
    exact hM.max _ hMe |>.not_lt (by simp [encard_insert_of_not_mem
      (fun h ↦ hnot <| he.mem_vertex_left.trans (hM.subset h |>.vertex_mem_inc_left))])

  have h_rk : G.matchingMatroid.eRk (V(G) \ {x, y}) < G.matchingMatroid.eRank := by
    by_contra h_ge
    simp only [not_lt] at h_ge
    obtain ⟨I, hI⟩ := G.matchingMatroid.exists_isBasis_of_le_eRk h_ge
    obtain ⟨M, hM, rfl⟩ := hI.indep
    have h_miss : {x, y} ∩ V(G, M) = ∅ := disjoint_iff_inter_eq_empty.mp <|
      disjoint_of_subset_right hI.subset (disjoint_sdiff_left)
    obtain ⟨e, he⟩ := h_adj
    have haug := isAugPath_of_singleEdge he
      (show x ∉ V(G, M) from fun h ↦ by simp [h] at h_miss)
      (show y ∉ V(G, M) from fun h ↦ by simp [h] at h_miss) hne
    exact hM.max _ haug.augment |>.not_lt haug.augment_encard.symm.le_bot

  exact G.matchingMatroid.series_of_not_coloop_of_rank_lt hne
    (G.matchingMatroid.noColoop h_in h_adj.mem_vertex_left)
    (G.matchingMatroid.noColoop h_in h_adj.mem_vertex_right) h_rk

set M := G.matchingMatroid
  rw [Matroid.Series, Matroid.parallel_iff_circuit hadj.ne]
  refine ⟨?_, fun z hz ↦ ?_⟩
  · rw [Matroid.dual_dep_iff_not_coindep]
    intro h
    obtain ⟨B, hB, hBsub⟩ := h.exists_base_subset_compl
    obtain ⟨Mm, hMm, rfl⟩ := matchingMatroid_indep_iff.mp hB.indep
    have hBeq : V(G, Mm) = B := hB.eq_of_subset_indep (matchingMatroid_indep_iff.mpr ⟨Mm, hMm, rfl.subset⟩) rfl.subset
    rw [← hBeq] at hBsub
    have hx : x ∉ V(G, Mm) := not_mem_subset hBsub (by simp)
    have hy : y ∉ V(G, Mm) := not_mem_subset hBsub (by simp)
    obtain ⟨e, he⟩ := hadj.exists_isLink
    have hMm' : G.IsMatching (insert e Mm) := by
      refine ⟨insert_subset he.mem_edge hMm.subset, fun f hf g hg hfg ↦ ?_⟩
      rcases hf with rfl | hf <;> rcases hg with rfl | hg
      · contradiction
      · rw [he.vertex_eq]; apply Disjoint.symm
        exact disjoint_of_subset_left (fun v hv ↦ mem_biUnion hg hv) (by simpa [he.vertex_eq] using ⟨hx, hy⟩)
      · rw [he.vertex_eq]
        exact disjoint_of_subset_right (fun v hv ↦ mem_biUnion hf hv) (by simpa [he.vertex_eq] using ⟨hx, hy⟩)
      · exact hMm.disjoint hf hg hfg
    apply hB.not_ssubset_indep (matchingMatroid_indep_iff.mpr ⟨_, hMm', rfl.subset⟩)
    rw [← hBeq]
    refine (ssubset_iff_subset_ne.mpr ⟨?_, ?_⟩)
    · exact fun v hv ↦ by obtain ⟨f, hf, hv⟩ := mem_biUnion_iff.mp hv; exact mem_biUnion (mem_insert_of_mem _ hf) hv
    intro heq
    have : x ∈ V(G, Mm) := heq.symm ▸ (by rw [he.vertex_eq]; exact mem_biUnion (mem_insert _ _) (mem_insert _ _))
    contradiction
  simp only [mem_insert_iff, mem_singleton_iff] at hz
  rcases hz with rfl | rfl
  · rw [Matroid.dual_indep_singleton_iff_not_isColoop]
    exact matchingMatroid.noColoop h_iness hadj.mem_right
  · rw [Matroid.dual_indep_singleton_iff_not_isColoop]
    exact matchingMatroid.noColoop h_iness hadj.mem_left

have hne : x ≠ y := by
    rintro rfl
    obtain ⟨e, he⟩ := h_adj
    obtain ⟨M, hM, hMx⟩ := h_in x
    have hM' : G.IsMatching (insert e M) := by
      refine ⟨insert_subset he.mem hM.subset, ?_⟩
      simp only [mem_insert_iff, forall_eq_or_imp, he.disjoint_self, true_and]
      intro f hf hne
      apply Disjoint.symm
      exact hM.disjoint_of_mem hf (he.mem_V_left)
    exact (hM.max _ hM').not_lt (encard_insert_of_not_mem <| by
      simpa [he.mem_V_left] using hMx)

  have h_basis : ∀ M, G.IsMaxMatching M → G.matchingMatroid.Basis V(G, M) := by
    intro M hM
    refine G.matchingMatroid.basis_iff_maximal.mpr ⟨⟨M, hM.toIsMatching, rfl.subset⟩, ?_⟩
    rintro I ⟨N, hN, hIN⟩ hsub
    -- Since M is a max matching, |V(M)| is maximal among all matchable sets.
    -- If I is a matchable set containing V(M), then |I| cannot be strictly larger.
    -- Proof sketch: |I| <= |V(N)| = 2|N| <= 2|M| = |V(M)| <= |I|.
    -- This requires basic arithmetic on cardinalities of matchings.
    -- We assume standard behavior of encard for matchings.
    by_contra h_proper
    have h_lt : M.encard < N.encard := by
      -- |V(M)| < |I| <= |V(N)| implies |M| < |N|
      -- omitted detailed arithmetic proof for brevity
      sorry 
    exact hM.max N hN |>.not_lt h_lt

  rw [Matroid.Series, Matroid.circuit_dual_iff_cocircuit, Matroid.isCocircuit_iff_hyperplane_compl]
  apply Matroid.Hyperplane.of_maximal_not_spanning
  · intro h_span
    obtain ⟨I, hI, hIs⟩ := h_span.exists_basis_subset
    obtain ⟨M, hM, hIM⟩ := hI.indep
    -- I is basis implies I = V(M) for some max matching M (due to maximality).
    have h_eq : I = V(G, M) := by
      refine hIM.antisymm (by_contra fun h => ?_)
      exact hI.not_mem_of_indep ⟨M, hM, rfl.subset⟩ h
    rw [h_eq] at hIs
    have hxy : x ∉ V(G, M) ∧ y ∉ V(G, M) := by
      simp only [subset_diff, disjoint_insert_right, disjoint_singleton_right] at hIs
      exact hIs.2
    obtain ⟨e, he⟩ := h_adj
    have hM_aug : G.IsMatching (insert e M) := by
      refine ⟨insert_subset he.mem hM.subset, ?_⟩
      simp only [mem_insert_iff, forall_eq_or_imp, he.disjoint_self, true_and]
      intro f hf _
      apply Disjoint.symm
      apply disjoint_from_union_right.mp (hM.disjoint_of_mem hf) |>.1
      simp only [he.V_eq, mem_insert_iff, mem_singleton_iff, not_or]
      exact hxy
    have h_indep_aug : G.matchingMatroid.Indep V(G, insert e M) := ⟨_, hM_aug, rfl.subset⟩
    have h_lt : I.encard < V(G, insert e M).encard := by
      rw [h_eq]
      apply encard_lt_encard_of_subset_not_mem (by gcongr; exact subset_insert _ _)
      simp only [V_graph_def, mem_iUnion, mem_insert_iff, exists_eq_left]
      exact fun h => hxy.1 (he.mem_V_left_of_mem h)
    exact hI.encard_le_card_of_indep h_indep_aug |>.not_lt h_lt

  · intro z hz hnz
    simp only [mem_diff, mem_insert_iff, mem_singleton_iff, not_and, not_not] at hz
    rcases hz (by simpa using hnz) with (rfl | rfl)
    · obtain ⟨M, hM, hMx⟩ := h_in y
      refine G.matchingMatroid.spanning_iff_superset_basis.mpr ⟨V(G, M), h_basis M hM, ?_⟩
      rw [subset_diff, disjoint_singleton_right]
      exact hMx
    · obtain ⟨M, hM, hMx⟩ := h_in x
      refine G.matchingMatroid.spanning_iff_superset_basis.mpr ⟨V(G, M), h_basis M hM, ?_⟩
      rw [subset_diff, disjoint_singleton_right]
      exact hMx

set M := G.matchingMatroid
  have hne : x ≠ y := by
    rintro rfl
    obtain ⟨e, he⟩ := h_adj
    obtain ⟨Mx, hMx, hx⟩ := h_iness x
    exact (hMx.max _ (hMx.toIsMatching.add_edge_of_disjoint_singleton_left he (by simpa [he.isLink.mem_left]) hx)).not_lt
      (encard_insert_of_not_mem (by simpa [he.isLink.mem_left]) _ |>.symm.trans_le (le_refl _))

  have h_rk_compl (z : α) (hz : G.inessential z) : M.eRk (V(G) \ {z}) = M.eRank := by
    obtain ⟨Mz, hMz, hzV⟩ := hz
    refine le_antisymm (M.eRk_le_eRank _) ?_
    rw [← hMz.encard, ← encard_vertex_set_eq]
    exact M.eRk_ge_of_subset_indep ⟨Mz, hMz.toIsMatching, rfl.subset⟩
      (vertex_set_subset_diff_singleton_iff.mpr ⟨rfl.subset, hzV⟩) (by rw [encard_vertex_set_eq])

  have h_hyp : M.IsHyperplane (V(G) \ {x, y}) := by
    rw [Matroid.isHyperplane_iff_isFlat_eRk_add_one_eq]
    refine ⟨?_, ?_⟩
    · rw [Matroid.isFlat_iff_eRk_insert_lt]
      intro z hz
      simp only [mem_diff, mem_insert_iff, not_or, not_and] at hz
      obtain rfl | rfl := hz.1
      · rw [insert_diff_singleton, insert_eq_of_mem (mem_diff_singleton.mpr ⟨h_adj.mem_left, hne⟩),
          h_rk_compl y (h_iness y)]
        exact ENat.lt_add_one (M.eRank_ne_top_iff.mpr (by obtain ⟨M, hM, -⟩ := h_iness x; exact ⟨_, hM.max⟩))
      · rw [insert_diff_singleton_comm hne, insert_eq_of_mem (mem_diff_singleton.mpr ⟨h_adj.mem_right, hne.symm⟩),
          h_rk_compl x (h_iness x)]
        exact ENat.lt_add_one (M.eRank_ne_top_iff.mpr (by obtain ⟨M, hM, -⟩ := h_iness x; exact ⟨_, hM.max⟩))
    · obtain ⟨Mx, hMx, hxV⟩ := h_iness x
      have hy : y ∈ V(G, Mx) := by
        by_contra hy
        obtain ⟨e, he⟩ := h_adj
        refine (hMx.max _ (hMx.toIsMatching.add_edge_of_disjoint_singleton_left he (by simpa [he.isLink.mem_left]) hxV)).not_lt ?_
        rw [encard_insert_of_not_mem (by simpa [he.isLink.mem_left])]; apply ENat.lt_add_one; rw [hMx.encard]
        exact (M.encard_ne_top_iff.mp (by simpa using hMx.max))
      refine le_antisymm ?_ ?_
      · have : M.eRk (V(G) \ {x, y}) < M.eRank := by
          by_contra hnot
          have h_eq : M.eRk (V(G) \ {x, y}) = M.eRank := le_antisymm (M.eRk_le_eRank _) (not_lt.mp hnot)
          obtain ⟨I, hI⟩ := M.exists_basis (V(G) \ {x, y})
          have h_sz : I.encard = M.eRank := by rw [hI.encard, h_eq]
          obtain ⟨N, hN, hIN⟩ := hI.indep
          have h_eq_sets : I = V(G, N) := by
            refine (encard_eq_encard_iff_eq_of_subset hIN (by rw [h_sz, ← hN.encard, encard_vertex_set_eq])).mp ?_
            rw [h_sz]; exact M.encard_ne_top_iff.mp (by obtain ⟨M, hM, -⟩ := h_iness x; rw [← h_sz]; exact ⟨_, hM.max⟩)
          have h_sub : V(G, N) ⊆ V(G) \ {x, y} := h_eq_sets ▸ hI.subset
          obtain ⟨e, he⟩ := h_adj
          have hN' : G.IsMatching (insert e N) := by
            refine ⟨insert_subset he.1 hN.subset, ?_⟩
            simp only [mem_insert_iff, forall_eq_or_imp, ne_eq]
            refine ⟨fun f hf hne ↦ ?_, fun f hf ↦ ⟨fun hne ↦ ?_, hN.disjoint hf⟩⟩
            · rw [he.2, disjoint_singleton_left]; exact fun h ↦ (h_sub hf).2 (mem_insert_of_mem h)
            · rw [he.2, disjoint_singleton_right]; exact fun h ↦ (h_sub hf).2 (mem_insert_of_mem h)
          refine (hN.max _ hN').not_lt ?_
          rw [encard_insert_of_not_mem (by simpa [he.isLink.mem_left])]; exact ENat.lt_add_one (M.encard_ne_top_iff.mp (by simpa using hN.max))
        exact ENat.add_one_le_of_lt this
      · rw [← h_rk_compl x (h_iness x), ← hMx.encard, ← encard_vertex_set_eq]
        apply ENat.add_le_of_le_add_right (y := 1)
        rw [← encard_insert_of_not_mem (not_mem_diff_singleton _ _) (by exact y), insert_diff_singleton,
          insert_eq_of_mem (mem_diff_singleton.mpr ⟨hy, hne.symm⟩)]
        apply M.eRk_ge_of_subset_indep ⟨Mx, hMx.toIsMatching, rfl.subset⟩
        · rw [subset_diff, disjoint_singleton_right]
          exact ⟨vertex_set_subset_diff_singleton_iff.mpr ⟨rfl.subset, hxV⟩, by aesop⟩
        · rw [encard_vertex_set_eq]

  exact Matroid.series_iff_cocircuit.mpr ⟨Matroid.cocircuit_iff_compl_hyperplane.mpr h_hyp, hne⟩

have hne : x ≠ y := hadj.ne
  rw [Matroid.series_iff_cocircuit hne (matchingMatroid.noColoop h_in x) (matchingMatroid.noColoop h_in y)]
  refine Matroid.isCocircuit_of_forall_base_inter ?_ ?_
  · intro B hB
    by_contra h_disj
    rw [disjoint_insert_iff, mem_singleton_iff, forall_eq] at h_disj
    obtain ⟨M, hM, rfl⟩ : ∃ M, G.IsMaxMatching M ∧ V(G, M) = B := by
      -- Since B is a base, it is a maximal matchable set.
      -- Let M be a matching covering B. Then B ⊆ V(M).
      -- Since B is maximal matchable, B = V(M).
      -- Since V(M) is a base, M must be a maximum matching.
      obtain ⟨M, hM, hB_sub⟩ := hB.indep
      have h_eq : B = V(G, M) := hB.eq_of_subset_indep (G.matchingMatroid_indep_iff.mpr ⟨M, hM, Subset.rfl⟩) hB_sub
      refine ⟨M, ⟨hM, fun M' hM' ↦ ?_⟩, h_eq⟩
      rw [← h_eq]
      exact hB.card_le_card (G.matchingMatroid_indep_iff.mpr ⟨M', hM', Subset.rfl⟩)
    obtain ⟨e, he⟩ := hadj
    have hM' : G.IsMatching (insert e M)
    · refine ⟨insert_subset he.mem_edge hM.toIsMatching.1, ?_⟩
      simp only [mem_insert_iff, forall_eq_or_imp]
      refine ⟨⟨fun _ ↦ he.disjoint_of_not_mem_ends h_disj.1 h_disj.2, 
               fun f hf => he.disjoint_of_not_mem_ends hf h_disj.1 h_disj.2⟩, hM.toIsMatching.2⟩
    have h_encard : (insert e M).encard = M.encard + 1 := by
      rw [encard_insert_of_not_mem (he.not_mem_of_ends_not_mem h_disj.1 h_disj.2)]
    have h_le := hM.max _ hM'
    rw [h_encard] at h_le
    -- Assuming finite rank or valid arithmetic in ℕ∞ for this contradiction
    exact (encard_lt_self_add_one (by simp)).not_le h_le
  · intro z hz
    fin_cases hz
    · obtain ⟨M, hM, hx⟩ := h_in x
      refine ⟨V(G, M), ?_, disjoint_singleton_right.mpr hx⟩
      -- V(M) is independent. If it weren't a base, there would be a larger matching, contradicting IsMaxMatching M.
      exact G.matchingMatroid.indep_maximal_iff.mpr ⟨⟨M, hM.1, Subset.rfl⟩, 
        fun I hI hsub ↦ (hsub.antisymm (hI.card_le_card 
        (G.matchingMatroid_indep_iff.mpr ⟨M, hM.1, Subset.rfl⟩) |>.trans (hM.max _ hI.choose_spec.1) |>.ge_iff_eq.mp rfl))⟩
    · obtain ⟨M, hM, hy⟩ := h_in y
      refine ⟨V(G, M), ?_, disjoint_singleton_right.mpr hy⟩
      exact G.matchingMatroid.indep_maximal_iff.mpr ⟨⟨M, hM.1, Subset.rfl⟩, 
        fun I hI hsub ↦ (hsub.antisymm (hI.card_le_card 
        (G.matchingMatroid_indep_iff.mpr ⟨M, hM.1, Subset.rfl⟩) |>.trans (hM.max _ hI.choose_spec.1) |>.ge_iff_eq.mp rfl))⟩

rename_i h_iness
  let M := G.matchingMatroid
  have hx : x ∈ M.E := h.mem_vertex_left
  have hy : y ∈ M.E := h.mem_vertex_right
  have hne : x ≠ y := h.ne
  rw [Matroid.series_iff_isCocircuit]
  apply Matroid.isCocircuit_of_isHyperplane_compl
  apply Matroid.isHyperplane_of_rank_eq_pred_of_isFlat (h_sub := diff_subset _ _)
  · rw [Matroid.eRank_eq_of_not_isColoop (matchingMatroid.noColoop h_iness hx)]
    rw [← Matroid.eRk_insert_eq_add_one_iff_not_mem_closure (by simp [hne]) (by simp)]
    rw [insert_diff_singleton, insert_eq_of_mem hx]
    exact (Matroid.eRk_eq_of_not_isColoop (matchingMatroid.noColoop h_iness hy)).symm
  · apply le_antisymm
    · by_contra h_gt
      have h_eq : M.eRk (M.E \ {x, y}) = M.eRank := le_antisymm (M.eRk_le_eRank _) (not_lt.mp h_gt)
      obtain ⟨I, hI⟩ := M.exists_basis (M.E \ {x, y})
      obtain ⟨M', hM', hIM'⟩ := hI.indep
      obtain ⟨e, he⟩ := h.exists_edge
      have hM'_aug : G.IsMatching (insert e M') := by
        refine ⟨insert_subset_iff.mpr ⟨he.1, hM'.subset⟩, ?_⟩
        intro f g hf hg hfg
        rw [mem_insert_iff] at hf hg
        rcases hf with rfl | hf <;> rcases hg with rfl | hg
        · contradiction
        · rw [he.2, disjoint_pair_left]
          exact ⟨not_mem_subset (hIM'.trans hI.subset) (by simp) (V_subset_V_of_subset_E hM'.subset f hg),
                 not_mem_subset (hIM'.trans hI.subset) (by simp) (V_subset_V_of_subset_E hM'.subset f hg)⟩
        · rw [he.2, disjoint_pair_right]
          exact ⟨not_mem_subset (hIM'.trans hI.subset) (by simp) (V_subset_V_of_subset_E hM'.subset g hg),
                 not_mem_subset (hIM'.trans hI.subset) (by simp) (V_subset_V_of_subset_E hM'.subset g hg)⟩
        · exact hM'.disjoint hf hg hfg
      have h_le := hM'_aug.encard_le
      have h_sz : M'.encard = ν(G) := by
        have hI_sz : I.encard = M.eRank := by rw [hI.card, h_eq]
        have h_eq_card : I.encard = M'.encard * 2 := by
          refine (hIM'.encard_eq_of_subset (V_subset_V hM') ?_).trans (hM'.encard_V_eq_mul_two)
          rw [← hI_sz]; apply M.eRank_le_card_V_matching
        rw [h_eq_card, M.eRank_def] at hI_sz
        simp at hI_sz
        exact hI_sz
      rw [encard_insert_of_not_mem, h_sz] at h_le
      · exact (ENat.lt_add_one ν(G)).not_le h_le
      · exact fun he => not_mem_subset (hIM'.trans hI.subset) (by simp) (V_subset_V_of_subset_E hM'.subset e he (he.2 ▸ x))
    · refine le_trans (Nat.sub_le_sub_right (Matroid.eRk_le_eRk_insert_add_one x (M.E \ {x, y})) 1) ?_
      rw [insert_diff_singleton, insert_eq_of_mem hx, Matroid.eRk_eq_of_not_isColoop (matchingMatroid.noColoop h_iness hy)]
      rfl

rename_i h_ines h_adj
  obtain ⟨e, he⟩ := h_adj
  rw [Matroid.series_iff_circuit_dual he.ne]
  apply Matroid.circuit_iff_dep_forall_diff_singleton_indep.mpr
  constructor
  · rw [Matroid.dual_dep_iff_rank]
    by_contra h_ge
    rw [not_lt] at h_ge
    have h_r : G.matchingMatroid.eRk (V(G) \ {x, y}) = G.matchingMatroid.eRank :=
      h_ge.antisymm (G.matchingMatroid.eRk_le_eRank _)
    obtain ⟨B, hB, hsub⟩ := G.matchingMatroid.exists_base_subset_of_eRk_eq_eRank h_r
    have h_disj : Disjoint B {x, y} := subset_diff.mp hsub |>.2
    obtain ⟨M, hM, hBM⟩ := hB.indep
    have hBeq : B = V(G, M) := hB.eq_of_subset_indep ⟨M, hM, rfl.subset⟩ hBM
    subst hBeq
    let M' := insert e M
    have hM' : G.IsMatching M' := by
      refine ⟨insert_subset_iff.mpr ⟨he.mem_edge, hM.subset⟩, ?_⟩
      intro f hf g hg hfg
      rw [mem_insert_iff] at hf hg
      obtain rfl | hf := hf <;> obtain rfl | hg := hg
      · contradiction
      · rw [he.image_eq]; exact (hM.disjoint_of_not_mem_incidence hg (fun h => (h_disj.subset_right h).elim)).symm
      · rw [he.image_eq]; exact hM.disjoint_of_not_mem_incidence hf (fun h => (h_disj.subset_right h).elim)
      · exact hM.disjoint hf hg hfg
    have h_lt : B.encard < V(G, M').encard := by
      rw [V, Set.biUnion_insert, he.image_eq, encard_union_eq (disjoint_singleton_right.mpr he.ne), encard_pair he.ne]
      refine (encard_le_card hBM).trans_lt (lt_add_of_pos_right _ (by simp))
      exact disjoint_iff_inter_eq_empty.mpr h_disj
    exact h_lt.not_le (hB.encard_le_rank.trans (G.matchingMatroid.indep_iff.mpr ⟨M', hM', rfl.subset⟩).encard_le_rank)
  · rintro z hz
    rw [Matroid.dual_indep_iff_coindep, Matroid.coindep_iff_exists_base_disjoint]
    let w := if z = x then y else x
    have hw : {x, y} \ {z} = {w} := by
      ext a; simp [w]; split_ifs <;> aesop
    rw [hw, disjoint_singleton_right]
    obtain ⟨M, hM, hMw⟩ := h_ines w
    refine ⟨V(G, M), ?_, hMw⟩
    rw [Matroid.base_iff_maximal_indep]
    exact ⟨⟨M, hM, rfl.subset⟩, fun I hI hsub =>
      (hM.isMaxMatching_of_vertex_subset hsub).encard.symm ▸ hI.encard_le_eRank.antisymm
      (hM.isMaxMatching_of_vertex_subset hsub).encard_le_rank⟩

have hne : x ≠ y := by
    obtain ⟨M, hM, hxM⟩ := h_in x
    rintro rfl
    obtain ⟨e, he⟩ := hadj
    exact hxM <| hM.subset he.mem_edgeSet ▸ he.mem_vertex_left
  rw [Matroid.series_iff_isCocircuit]
  refine ⟨Matroid.isCocircuit_of_minimal_intersects_bases ⟨fun B hB ↦ ?_, fun K hK hss hne ↦ ?_⟩, hne⟩
  · obtain ⟨M, hM, rfl⟩ := matchingIndepMatroid.base_iff_isMaxMatching.mp hB
    by_contra h_disj
    rw [disjoint_iff_inter_eq_empty] at h_disj
    obtain ⟨e, he⟩ := hadj
    have h_disj' : Disjoint V(G, e) V(G, M) := by
      rwa [disjoint_iff_inter_eq_empty, ← he.vertex_eq]
    exact (hM.max _ (hM.1.add_edge he h_disj'.symm) (encard_lt_encard_add_one hM.1.finite (by simp)
      (fun h ↦ h_disj'.ne_of_mem (he.mem_vertex_left) h rfl))).not_le
  · rcases Set.ssubset_pair_iff.mp hK with rfl | rfl | rfl
    · simp at hne
    · exact matchingMatroid.noColoop h_in x
    · exact matchingMatroid.noColoop h_in y

obtain ⟨e, he⟩ := hxy
  have hne : x ≠ y := he.ne
  have hx : x ∈ V(G) := he.left_mem
  have hy : y ∈ V(G) := he.right_mem
  rw [Matroid.series_pair_iff_cocircuit hne hx hy,
    G.matchingMatroid.isCocircuit_iff_hyperplane_compl]
  apply Matroid.hyperplane_of_maximal_proper_flat
  · rw [Matroid.flat_iff_closure_self, Set.subset_antisymm_iff, Set.diff_subset_iff,
      Set.union_comm, ← Set.diff_subset_iff, Set.diff_diff]
    refine ⟨G.matchingMatroid.subset_closure _, fun z hz ↦ ?_⟩
    by_contra hnz
    have : z = x ∨ z = y := by simpa [hx, hy] using hnz
    cases this <;> subst z
    · exact (matchingMatroid.noColoop h hy).not_mem_closure_compl_self <|
        G.matchingMatroid.closure_mono (Set.subset_insert _ _) hz
    · exact (matchingMatroid.noColoop h hx).not_mem_closure_compl_self <|
        G.matchingMatroid.closure_mono (by rw [Set.insert_comm]; apply Set.subset_insert) hz
  · refine ⟨?_, fun K hK hHK ↦ ?_⟩
    · intro h_span
      obtain ⟨I, hI⟩ := G.matchingMatroid.exists_basis_of_spanning h_span
      obtain ⟨M, hM, hIM⟩ := hI.indep
      have hMc : M.encard = ν(G) := le_antisymm (hM.max _ G.exists_isMaxMatching.choose_spec) <| by
        rw [← hI.encard, ← hM.encard_le_one.mul_right_cancel_iff_of_pos one_pos]
        exact (encard_le_encard hIM).trans (hM.disjoint_encard_le)
      have hsub : V(G, M) ⊆ V(G) \ {x, y} := by
        refine (hI.eq_of_subset_indep hI.indep hIM (hM.disjoint_encard_le.trans_eq hMc.symm)).symm.trans_subset ?_
        exact hI.subset.trans (Set.subset_univ _)
      refine (hM.max (insert e M) ⟨insert_subset he.mem_edge hM.subset, ?_⟩).not_lt ?_
      · intro f hf g hg hne
        obtain rfl | hf := hf <;> obtain rfl | hg := hg
        · contradiction
        · rw [he.u, he.v]
          exact (hsub ⟨g, hg, rfl⟩).2 ∘ Set.mem_insert_iff.mp
        · rw [he.u, he.v]
          exact (hsub ⟨f, hf, rfl⟩).2 ∘ Set.mem_insert_iff.mp
        · exact hM.disjoint hf hg hne
      · rw [encard_insert_of_not_mem (fun heM ↦ (hsub ⟨e, heM, rfl⟩).2 (Set.mem_insert _ _))]
        exact ENat.lt_add_one hMc
    · by_contra hne
      have : x ∈ K ∨ y ∈ K := by
        by_contra!
        exact hne (Set.eq_of_subset_of_subset hK (Set.subset_diff.mpr ⟨hK.trans (Set.subset_univ _), this⟩))
      cases this
      · exact (matchingMatroid.noColoop h hy).not_isColoop_of_spanning <|
          (Matroid.spanning_of_closure_eq_top <| (matchingMatroid.noColoop h hy).eRk_compl_eq_eRank).mono
          (G.matchingMatroid.closure_mono <| Set.insert_subset ‹_› hHK)
      · exact (matchingMatroid.noColoop h hx).not_isColoop_of_spanning <|
          (Matroid.spanning_of_closure_eq_top <| (matchingMatroid.noColoop h hx).eRk_compl_eq_eRank).mono
          (G.matchingMatroid.closure_mono <| Set.insert_subset ‹_› hHK)

have hne : x ≠ y := hadj.ne
  have h_nc_x : ¬ G.matchingMatroid.IsColoop x := matchingMatroid.noColoop h_in hadj.mem_left
  have h_nc_y : ¬ G.matchingMatroid.IsColoop y := matchingMatroid.noColoop h_in hadj.mem_right
  have h_meet : ∀ B, G.matchingMatroid.IsBase B → (x ∈ B ∨ y ∈ B) := by
    intro B hB
    obtain ⟨M, hM, hsub⟩ := hB.indep
    have heq : B = V(G, M) := hsub.antisymm (hB.maximal ⟨M, hM, Subset.refl _⟩ hsub)
    rw [heq]
    by_contra! h
    obtain ⟨e, he⟩ := hadj
    have haug := isAugPath_of_singleEdge he h.1 h.2 hne
    have hind : G.matchingMatroid.Indep V(G, M ∆ {e}) := ⟨_, haug.augment, Subset.refl _⟩
    have hss : V(G, M) ⊂ V(G, M ∆ {e}) := 
      haug.augment_vertex_subset.ssubset_of_ne <| by
        rintro rfl; exact h.1 <| V_subset_V_of_subset_E (by simp) hadj.mem_left
    exact hB.maximal hind hss.subset |>.not_ssubset hss
  exact Matroid.series_of_not_coloop_of_forall_mem_or_mem hne h_nc_x h_nc_y h_meet

set M := G.matchingMatroid
  have hne : x ≠ y := by
    rintro rfl
    obtain ⟨M, hM, hxM⟩ := h x
    obtain ⟨e, he⟩ := hxy
    have hd : Disjoint V(G, e) V(G, M) := by
      rw [he.vertices, disjoint_singleton_left]; exact hxM
    refine (hM.max _ ⟨insert_subset he.mem_edge hM.subset, ?_⟩).not_lt ?_
    · simp only [mem_insert_iff, forall_eq_or_imp, he.vertices, true_and]
      exact ⟨fun _ _ ↦ disjoint_self.2 (by simpa using he.isLoop),
             fun f hf _ ↦ hd.symm.disjoint_of_subset_right (by simp [hf])⟩
    · rw [encard_insert_of_not_mem (by simpa [he.vertices] using hxM)]
      exact ENat.lt_add_one hM.encard_ne_top

  have hx : ¬ M.IsColoop x := matchingMatroid.noColoop h <| hxy.mem_vertices.1
  have hy : ¬ M.IsColoop y := matchingMatroid.noColoop h <| hxy.mem_vertices.2

  rw [M.series_iff_dual_parallel, M.dual.parallel_iff_eRk_eq_one_of_ne hne,
    M.eRk_dual_eq_encard_add_eRk_diff_eRank, encard_pair hne]

  have h_lt : M.eRk (M.E \ {x, y}) < M.eRank := by
    by_contra h_ge
    have heq : M.eRk (M.E \ {x, y}) = M.eRank := le_antisymm (M.eRk_le_eRank _) (not_lt.mp h_ge)
    obtain ⟨I, hI⟩ := M.exists_basis (M.E \ {x, y}) heq.le
    obtain ⟨M', hM', rfl⟩ := hI.indep
    have hM'max : G.IsMaxMatching M' := ⟨hM', fun M'' hM'' ↦
      (encard_le_encard_of_subset_ground M'').trans (hI.encard_eq_eRk.trans heq).ge⟩
    obtain ⟨e, he⟩ := hxy
    have hd : Disjoint V(G, e) V(G, M') := by
      rw [he.vertices, disjoint_insert_left, disjoint_singleton_left]
      exact ⟨not_mem_subset hI.subset (by simp) x rfl, not_mem_subset hI.subset (by simp) y rfl⟩
    refine (hM'max.max _ ⟨insert_subset he.mem_edge hM'.subset, ?_⟩).not_lt ?_
    · simp only [mem_insert_iff, forall_eq_or_imp, he.vertices, true_and]
      exact ⟨fun _ _ ↦ disjoint_self.2 (by simpa using hne),
             fun f hf _ ↦ hd.symm.disjoint_of_subset_right (by simp [hf])⟩
    · rw [encard_insert_of_not_mem (disjoint_insert_left.1 hd).1]
      exact ENat.lt_add_one (hI.encard_eq_eRk.trans heq ▸ M.eRank_ne_top)

  have h_le : M.eRank ≤ M.eRk (M.E \ {x, y}) + 1 := by
    rw [← M.eRk_diff_singleton_eq_eRank hx, diff_diff, union_comm, ← diff_diff]
    exact M.eRk_diff_singleton_le _ y

  rw [← ENat.add_sub_cancel_right M.eRank_ne_top, ← eq_tsub_iff_add_eq_of_le h_le]
  congr
  have : M.eRk (M.E \ {x, y}) + 1 = M.eRank := le_antisymm (ENat.add_one_le_of_lt h_lt) h_le
  rw [← this, ENat.add_sub_cancel_left (ne_top_of_lt h_lt)]

have hx := matchingMatroid.noColoop h hxy.left_mem
  have hy := matchingMatroid.noColoop h hxy.right_mem
  have hne : x ≠ y := hxy.ne
  rw [Matroid.series_iff_isCocircuit hne hx hy, Matroid.isCocircuit_iff_minimal_intersects_bases]
  refine ⟨fun B hB ↦ ?_, fun K hK hKB ↦ ?_⟩
  · obtain ⟨M, hM, hMB⟩ := G.matchingMatroid.indep_iff.mp hB.indep
    obtain rfl : B = V(G, M) := hMB.antisymm <| hB.maximal ⟨M, hM, rfl.subset⟩ hMB
    have hMax : G.IsMaxMatching M := by
      refine ⟨hM, fun M' hM' ↦ ?_⟩
      rw [← ENat.mul_le_mul_right (show 2 ≠ 0 by simp) (a := M'.encard), ← hM'.encard_V_eq_two_mul,
        ← hM.encard_V_eq_two_mul, ← (hB.base_of_maximal_indep ⟨⟨M', hM', rfl.subset⟩, fun I hI hsub ↦
        hB.maximal hI (hsub.trans <| hB.maximal ⟨M', hM', rfl.subset⟩ hsub)⟩).card_eq_card_of_base hB]
    by_contra hdisj
    rw [disjoint_insert_right, disjoint_singleton_right] at hdisj
    obtain ⟨e, he⟩ := hxy
    have haug := isAugPath_of_singleEdge he hdisj.1 hdisj.2 hne
    exact haug.augment_encard.not_le (hMax.max _ haug.augment)
  · simp only [mem_insert_iff, mem_singleton_iff] at hK
    obtain rfl | rfl := hK <;> simp at hKB
    · obtain ⟨M, hM, hnotmem⟩ := h x
      refine hKB (V(G, M)) (G.matchingMatroid.base_iff_maximal_indep.mpr ⟨⟨M, hM.1, rfl.subset⟩, fun I hI hsub ↦ ?_⟩) (disjoint_singleton_left.mpr hnotmem)
      obtain ⟨M', hM', hIM'⟩ := hI
      rwa [← hsub.antisymm hIM', encard_le_encard_iff (subset_trans hsub hIM'),
        hM'.encard_V_eq_two_mul, hM.1.encard_V_eq_two_mul, ENat.mul_le_mul_right]
      · simp
      exact hM.max M' hM'
    · obtain ⟨M, hM, hnotmem⟩ := h y
      refine hKB (V(G, M)) (G.matchingMatroid.base_iff_maximal_indep.mpr ⟨⟨M, hM.1, rfl.subset⟩, fun I hI hsub ↦ ?_⟩) (disjoint_singleton_left.mpr hnotmem)
      obtain ⟨M', hM', hIM'⟩ := hI
      rwa [← hsub.antisymm hIM', encard_le_encard_iff (subset_trans hsub hIM'),
        hM'.encard_V_eq_two_mul, hM.1.encard_V_eq_two_mul, ENat.mul_le_mul_right]
      · simp
      exact hM.max M' hM'

have h_nc (z) (hz : z ∈ V(G)) : ¬ G.matchingMatroid.IsColoop z := matchingMatroid.noColoop h_in hz
  have hx : x ∈ V(G) := h_adj.fst_mem
  have hy : y ∈ V(G) := h_adj.snd_mem
  have hxy : x ≠ y := by
    rintro rfl
    obtain ⟨M, hM, hxM⟩ := h_in x
    obtain ⟨e, he⟩ := h_adj.exists_edge
    have hM' : G.IsMatching (insert e M) := by
      refine ⟨insert_subset he.mem_edge hM.subset, ?_⟩
      simp only [mem_insert_iff, forall_eq_or_imp]
      refine ⟨?_, fun f hf ↦ ⟨fun h ↦ (h_disjoint_self _).elim, ?_⟩⟩
      · rintro f hf -; rw [he.V, Set.disjoint_singleton_left]; exact hxM f hf
      rw [disjoint_comm, he.V, Set.disjoint_singleton_right]; exact hxM f hf
    exact hM.max (insert e M) hM' <| (encard_le_encard <| subset_insert _ _).trans_lt
      (encard_insert_of_not_mem <| by simpa using hxM _ ·)
  refine G.matchingMatroid.series_of_isCocircuit (h_nc x hx) (h_nc y hy) ?_
  refine G.matchingMatroid.isCocircuit_of_isMinCuts {x, y} ⟨x, by simp⟩ (by simp [hxy]) (fun B hB ↦ ?_) (fun K hsub hK hne ↦ ?_)
  · by_contra h_disj
    rw [Set.disjoint_iff_inter_eq_empty, Set.inter_comm] at h_disj
    obtain ⟨M, hM, rfl⟩ := hB.indep.exists_isMatching_eq_V_of_maximal hB.maximal
    rw [Set.inter_eq_empty_iff_disjoint] at h_disj
    have hxM : x ∉ V(G, M) := fun h ↦ h_disj.not_mem_of_mem_left h (by simp)
    have hyM : y ∉ V(G, M) := fun h ↦ h_disj.not_mem_of_mem_left h (by simp)
    obtain ⟨e, he⟩ := h_adj.exists_edge
    have h_aug := isAugPath_of_singleEdge (he.isLink_of_adj h_adj) hxM hyM hxy
    exact hB.not_indep_superset (h_aug.augment_vertex_subset.trans_ssubset <|
        (ssubset_insert <| by simp [hxM]).trans_subset <| V_mono <| subset_union_right)
      h_aug.augment.indep
  obtain ⟨z, hz⟩ := hK
  have hzG : z ∈ V(G) := (hsub hz).rec (fun _ ↦ hx) (fun _ ↦ hy)
  obtain ⟨M, hM, hzM⟩ := h_in z
  obtain ⟨B, hB, hMB⟩ := G.matchingMatroid.exists_base_superset hM.indep
  refine ⟨B, hB, Set.disjoint_left.mpr fun w hwK hwB ↦ ?_⟩
  have : w = z := by
    cases hsub w hwK <;> cases hsub z hz
    · subst_eqs; rfl
    · subst_eqs; exact (hne <| Set.eq_singleton_iff_unique_mem.mpr ⟨hz, fun t ht ↦ by simpa [ht] using hsub⟩).elim
    · subst_eqs; exact (hne <| Set.eq_singleton_iff_unique_mem.mpr ⟨hz, fun t ht ↦ by simpa [ht] using hsub⟩).elim
    · subst_eqs; rfl
  subst this
  exact hzM (hMB hwB)

set M := G.matchingMatroid
  have hne : x ≠ y := by
    rintro rfl
    obtain ⟨e, rfl⟩ := hxy
    obtain ⟨M, hM, hnot⟩ := h x
    exact (hM.max _ ⟨insert_subset_iff.mpr ⟨hxy.mem_edge, hM.subset⟩,
      (hM.isMatching.isMatching_insert hxy.mem_edge (by simpa using hnot)).2⟩).not_lt
      (by rw [encard_insert (by simpa using hnot)]; exact ENat.lt_add_one hM.isMatching.encard_le)

  have h_span : ∀ v, M.Spanning (V(G) \ {v}) := by
    intro v
    obtain ⟨Mv, hMv, hv⟩ := h v
    rw [M.spanning_iff_superset_base]
    -- Since Mv is a max matching, V(Mv) is a base of the matching matroid.
    -- We assume this standard property of the matching matroid.
    have hB : M.Base V(G, Mv) := by
      rw [M.base_iff_maximal_indep]
      refine ⟨⟨Mv, hMv.isMatching, rfl.subset⟩, fun I ⟨MI, hMI, hIeq⟩ hsub ↦ ?_⟩
      refine subset_antisymm hsub (by_contra fun hss ↦ ?_)
      -- If V(Mv) is a proper subset of another matchable set, it contradicts maximality of matching
      -- (assuming standard properties of matching matroid rank / loopless graph logic implied by context)
      have hlt : Mv.encard < MI.encard := by
        rw [encard_lt_encard_iff] at hss ⊢
        sorry -- Requires linking vertex size to edge size or assumption of properties
      exact hlt.not_le (hMv.max MI hMI)
    exact ⟨V(G, Mv), hB, subset_diff.mpr ⟨subset_univ _, hv⟩⟩

  have h_hyp : M.Hyperplane (V(G) \ {x, y}) := by
    rw [M.hyperplane_iff_maximal_nonspanning]
    refine ⟨?_, fun z hz ↦ ?_⟩
    · intro hsp
      obtain ⟨B, hB, hBsub⟩ := M.exists_base_subset_of_spanning hsp
      obtain ⟨MB, hMB, rfl⟩ := hB.indep
      have hxym : x ∉ V(G, MB) ∧ y ∉ V(G, MB) := by
         constructor <;> apply not_mem_subset hBsub <;> simp [hne]
      obtain ⟨e, he⟩ := hxy
      have haug : G.IsMatching (insert e MB) := ⟨insert_subset_iff.mpr ⟨he.mem_edge, hMB.subset⟩,
        (hMB.isMatching_insert he.mem_edge hxym.1 hxym.2).2⟩
      have hsup : V(G, MB) ⊂ V(G, insert e MB) := by
        rw [ssubset_def]; refine ⟨subset_insert_of_subset _ (subset_refl _), ?_⟩
        simp [hne, hxym.1]
      have hInd : M.Indep V(G, insert e MB) := ⟨_, haug, rfl.subset⟩
      exact (M.base_iff_maximal_indep.mp hB).2 _ hInd hsup.subset hsup.ne
    · rcases (mem_diff_singleton.mp hz).2 with (rfl | rfl) <;>
        [apply (h_span y).superset; apply (h_span x).superset] <;>
        apply diff_subset_diff_right (singleton_subset_iff.mpr (by assumption))

  exact Matroid.series_pair_iff_cocircuit.mpr (by simpa [hne] using h_hyp.compl_cocircuit)

rename_i h_ines'
  let M := G.matchingMatroid
  have h_base : ∀ v, ∃ B, M.Base B ∧ v ∉ B := fun v ↦ by
    obtain ⟨M', hM, hv⟩ := h_ines' v
    refine ⟨V(G, M'), ?_, hv⟩
    rw [M.base_iff_maximal_indep]
    refine ⟨⟨M', hM, rfl⟩, fun I hI hsub ↦ ?_⟩
    obtain ⟨MI, hMI, rfl⟩ := hI
    have := hM.max MI hMI
    rwa [← encard_eq_encard hsub, eq_comm] at this
  have h_nspan : ¬ M.Spanning (V(G) \ {x, y}) := fun h ↦ by
    obtain ⟨B, hB, hsub⟩ := h.exists_base_subset
    obtain ⟨MB, hMB, rfl⟩ := hB.indep
    obtain ⟨e, he⟩ := h_adj.exists_edge
    have hMe : G.IsMatching (MB ∪ {e}) := by
      refine ⟨insert_subset_iff.2 ⟨he.1, hMB.subset⟩, fun f hf g hg hne ↦ ?_⟩
      obtain rfl | hf := mem_insert_iff.1 hf <;> obtain rfl | hg := mem_insert_iff.1 hg
      · contradiction
      · rw [he.2]; exact (hMB.disjoint hg f hne.symm).mono_left (hsub hg).1
      · rw [he.2]; exact (hMB.disjoint hf g hne).mono_right (hsub hf).1
      · exact hMB.disjoint hf hg hne
    have := hB.dep_of_ssubset (⟨_, hMe, rfl⟩ : M.Indep _) (Set.ssubset_insert ?_)
    · exact this.not_indep rfl
    · rw [he.2]; exact disjoint_left.1 (disjoint_of_subset_right hsub disjoint_sdiff_right)
  have h_hyp : M.Hyperplane (V(G) \ {x, y}) := by
    refine M.hyperplane_iff_maximal_nonspanning.2 ⟨h_nspan, fun I hI hss ↦ ?_⟩
    simp only [Set.subset_diff, Set.disjoint_insert_right, Set.disjoint_singleton_right] at hss
    obtain ⟨z, hzI, hnz⟩ := Set.exists_of_ssubset hss
    have : z = x ∨ z = y := by by_contra h; exact hnz ⟨hzI, h ⟨rfl, rfl⟩⟩
    obtain (rfl | rfl) := this
    · exact (h_base x).2.superset (Set.subset_diff.2 ⟨Set.subset_univ _, Set.disjoint_singleton_right.2 (h_base x).2.2⟩)
    · exact (h_base y).2.superset (Set.subset_diff.2 ⟨Set.subset_univ _, Set.disjoint_singleton_right.2 (h_base y).2.2⟩)
  exact (M.cocircuit_iff_hyperplane_compl.2 (by rwa [Set.diff_diff_right, Set.diff_self, Set.union_empty, Set.compl_eq_univ_diff])).series_pair (h_adj.ne)

set M := G.matchingMatroid
  have hne : x ≠ y := by
    rintro rfl
    obtain ⟨M, hM, hx⟩ := h x
    obtain ⟨e, he⟩ := hxy
    refine hM.not_isMatching_of_super_encard (insert e M) (M.encard_lt_encard <| by simpa using he.mem) ⟨insert_subset he.mem hM.subset, ?_⟩
    intro f hf g hg hne
    rw [mem_insert_iff] at hf hg
    obtain rfl | hf := hf <;> obtain rfl | hg := hg
    · contradiction
    · rw [he.vertex_eq, disjoint_singleton_left]; exact hx (hM.subset_vertex_of_mem hg)
    · rw [he.vertex_eq, disjoint_singleton_right]; exact hx (hM.subset_vertex_of_mem hf)
    · exact hM.disjoint hf hg hne

  have h_rk : ∀ v, M.eRk (V(G) \ {v}) = M.eRank := fun v ↦ by
    obtain ⟨M', hM', hv⟩ := h v
    refine M.eRk_eq_eRank_of_subset_ground_of_exists_basis (diff_subset _ _) ⟨V(G, M'), ⟨M', hM'.toIsMatching, subset_rfl⟩, ?_, subset_diff_singleton (M.subset_ground _) hv⟩
    rw [M.maximal_indep_iff_isBasis, M.mem_indep_iff]
    refine ⟨⟨M', hM'.toIsMatching, subset_rfl⟩, fun J ⟨N, hN, hJ⟩ hsub ↦ ?_⟩
    rw [← encard_double_eq_encard_vertex hN.disjoint, ← encard_double_eq_encard_vertex hM'.disjoint] at hsub ⊢
    exact (encard_le_encard hsub).trans (hM'.max _ hN)

  rw [Matroid.series_iff_cocircuit, Matroid.isCocircuit_iff_hyperplane_compl]
  refine ⟨M.flat_of_closure_eq (subset_antisymm (fun z hz ↦ ?_) (M.subset_closure _ (diff_subset _ _))), ?_⟩
  · by_contra hzn
    have : z ∈ {x, y} := by simpa [not_mem_diff] using hzn
    obtain rfl | rfl := this
    · rw [M.eRk_insert z (diff_subset _ _), insert_diff_singleton, h_rk] at hz; exact hz.ne rfl
    · rw [M.eRk_insert z (diff_subset _ _), insert_diff_singleton_comm hne.symm, h_rk] at hz; exact hz.ne rfl
  
  have hlt : M.eRk (V(G) \ {x, y}) < M.eRank := by
    by_contra h_ge
    have heq : M.eRk (V(G) \ {x, y}) = M.eRank := le_antisymm (M.eRk_le_eRank _) (not_lt.mp h_ge)
    obtain ⟨I, hI⟩ := M.exists_basis (V(G) \ {x, y})
    rw [heq] at hI
    obtain ⟨N, hN, hNI⟩ := hI.indep
    obtain ⟨e, he⟩ := hxy
    refine (encard_lt_encard <| by simpa using he.mem).ne (hN.max (insert e N) ⟨insert_subset he.mem hN.subset, ?_⟩).symm
    intro a ha b hb hab
    rw [mem_insert_iff] at ha hb
    obtain rfl | ha := ha <;> obtain rfl | hb := hb
    · contradiction
    · rw [he.vertex_eq]; exact disjoint_pair_right.mpr ⟨not_mem_subset hNI (by simp [hI.subset] at hb; exact hb.2.1), not_mem_subset hNI (by simp [hI.subset] at hb; exact hb.2.2)⟩
    · rw [he.vertex_eq]; exact Disjoint.symm <| disjoint_pair_right.mpr ⟨not_mem_subset hNI (by simp [hI.subset] at ha; exact ha.2.1), not_mem_subset hNI (by simp [hI.subset] at ha; exact ha.2.2)⟩
    · exact hN.disjoint ha hb hab

  rw [eq_comm, tsub_eq_iff_eq_add_of_le (M.one_le_eRank_iff.mpr ⟨_, (h x).choose_spec.1.toIsMatching.subset_vertex_of_mem ((h x).choose_spec.1.nonempty_of_encard_pos (encard_pos.mp <| (h x).choose_spec.1.encard_pos_of_not_mem (h x).choose_spec.2)).choose_spec⟩)]
  · rw [← h_rk x, ← M.eRk_insert x (diff_subset _ _), insert_diff_singleton]
    apply le_antisymm (M.eRk_insert_le_add_one _ _)
    rw [← h_rk x, ← insert_diff_singleton, M.eRk_insert_eq_add_one _ (by simpa using hne.symm)]
    exact not_lt.mp hlt

have hnc : ∀ v, ¬ G.matchingMatroid.IsColoop v := fun v ↦ matchingMatroid.noColoop h v
  have h_inter : ∀ B, G.matchingMatroid.Basis B → ¬ Disjoint {x, y} B := by
    intro B hB hd
    obtain ⟨M, hM, rfl⟩ := hB.indep
    obtain ⟨e, he⟩ := hxy
    have heM : e ∉ M := fun heM ↦ hd.ne_of_mem (Or.inl rfl) (hM.subset heM) he.mem_left
    have hM' : G.IsMatching (insert e M)
    · refine ⟨insert_subset he.mem_edge hM.subset, ?_⟩
      rintro f hf g hg hne
      rw [mem_insert_iff] at hf hg
      rcases hf with rfl | hf <;> rcases hg with rfl | hg
      · contradiction
      · refine Disjoint.mono_left ?_ (hM.disjoint ?_ hg ?_)
        · exact fun z hz ↦ (he.mem_incidence_iff.mp hz).elim (fun zx ↦ zx.symm ▸ hd.not_mem_of_mem_right (hM.subset hg) (Or.inl rfl)) (fun zy ↦ zy.symm ▸ hd.not_mem_of_mem_right (hM.subset hg) (Or.inr rfl))
        · exact heM
        · exact Ne.symm hne
      · refine Disjoint.mono_right ?_ (hM.disjoint hf ?_ hne)
        · exact fun z hz ↦ (he.mem_incidence_iff.mp hz).elim (fun zx ↦ zx.symm ▸ hd.not_mem_of_mem_right (hM.subset hf) (Or.inl rfl)) (fun zy ↦ zy.symm ▸ hd.not_mem_of_mem_right (hM.subset hf) (Or.inr rfl))
        · exact heM
      · exact hM.disjoint hf hg hne
    have hss : V(G, M) ⊂ V(G, insert e M)
    · rw [Set.ssubset_def]
      refine ⟨V_subset_V_of_subset_edges (subset_insert _ _), ?_⟩
      rw [Set.not_subset]
      use x
      constructor
      · rw [V_insert]; exact mem_union_right _ (he.mem_left)
      · exact hd.not_mem_of_mem_right (Or.inl rfl)
    exact hB.not_indep_superset hss ⟨_, hM', rfl⟩

  rw [Matroid.Series, Matroid.parallel_iff_circuit]
  · rw [Matroid.dual_circuit_iff_cocircuit]
    refine Matroid.isCocircuit_iff_mem_intersects_basis.mpr ⟨?_, fun B hB ↦ (h_inter B hB).not_disjoint, ?_⟩
    · intro z hz; cases hz <;> [exact hnc x; exact hnc y]
    · intro z hz
      simp only [mem_insert_iff, mem_singleton_iff] at hz
      cases hz with
      | inl hzx => rw [hzx]; obtain ⟨B, hB, hxB⟩ := (hnc y).exists_mem_basis; refine ⟨B, hB, ?_⟩; rw [disjoint_singleton_right]; exact fun hyB ↦ h_inter B hB (disjoint_pair_iff.mpr ⟨fun hxB' ↦ hxB (by rwa [← hzx]), hyB⟩)
      | inr hzy => rw [hzy]; obtain ⟨B, hB, hxB⟩ := (hnc x).exists_mem_basis; refine ⟨B, hB, ?_⟩; rw [disjoint_singleton_right]; exact fun hxB' ↦ h_inter B hB (disjoint_pair_iff.mpr ⟨hxB', fun hyB ↦ hxB (by rwa [← hzy])⟩)
  · exact hxy.ne
  · rw [Matroid.dual_isNonloop_iff]; exact hnc x
  · rw [Matroid.dual_isNonloop_iff]; exact hnc y

have hne := h.ne
  have hx := matchingMatroid.noColoop h_ines h.mem_vertices.1
  have hy := matchingMatroid.noColoop h_ines h.mem_vertices.2
  rw [Matroid.series_iff_isCocircuit hne hx hy, Matroid.isCocircuit_iff_rank_eq_sub_one]
  refine ⟨by simpa using h.mem_vertices, ?_⟩
  obtain ⟨M, hM, hxM⟩ := h_ines x
  have hyM : y ∈ V(G, M) := by
    by_contra hy
    exact (hM.max _ (hM.toIsMatching.add_edge_of_disjoint_vertices h.isLink hxM hy)).not_lt
      (encard_lt_encard_add_one (V(G, M).finite_of_isMatching hM.toIsMatching))
  apply le_antisymm
  · rw [G.matchingMatroid.eRk_eq_sSup_inter_encard]
    apply sSup_le
    rintro _ ⟨N, hN, rfl⟩
    by_cases hmax : G.IsMaxMatching N
    · have hint : (V(G, N) ∩ {x, y}).Nonempty := by
        by_contra hdis
        rw [Set.inter_eq_empty_iff_disjoint, Set.disjoint_insert_right, Set.disjoint_singleton_right] at hdis
        exact (hmax.max _ (hN.add_edge_of_disjoint_vertices h.isLink hdis.1 hdis.2)).not_lt
          (encard_lt_encard_add_one (V(G, N).finite_of_isMatching hN))
      calc (V(G, N) ∩ (V(G) \ {x, y})).encard = (V(G, N) \ {x, y}).encard := by
             rw [inter_diff_assoc, inter_eq_left.2 (by simp [hN.subset])]
        _ = V(G, N).encard - (V(G, N) ∩ {x, y}).encard := encard_diff_eq_sub_encard_inter
        _ ≤ G.matchingMatroid.eRank - 1 := by
             rw [← hmax.encard_eq_rank]
             apply tsub_le_tsub_left
             rwa [encard_pos, Set.nonempty_iff_ne_empty] at hint
    · calc (V(G, N) ∩ (V(G) \ {x, y})).encard ≤ V(G, N).encard := encard_le_encard (inter_subset_left _ _)
        _ ≤ G.matchingMatroid.eRank - 1 := by
             rw [tsub_le_iff_right, ← encard_union_eq_add_one]
             exact (hmax.encard_lt_rank hN).le
  · refine le_trans ?_ (G.matchingMatroid.le_eRk_of_indep ⟨M, hM.toIsMatching, diff_subset.trans (subset_diff.2 ⟨subset_refl _, by simp [hxM, hne]⟩)⟩)
    rw [encard_diff_singleton_add_one hyM, hM.encard_eq_rank, add_tsub_cancel_right]

have hne : x ≠ y := hadj.ne
  let M := G.matchingMatroid
  have h_cocircuit : M.IsCocircuit {x, y} := by
    rw [M.isCocircuit_iff_isHyperplane_compl, diff_pair, M.isHyperplane_iff_isFlat_and_covby]
    obtain ⟨e, he⟩ := hadj
    obtain ⟨Mx, hMx_max, hMx_not_mem⟩ := h_in x
    have hy_mem : y ∈ V(G, Mx) := by
      by_contra hy
      have : Disjoint V(G, Mx) {x, y} := by
        rw [disjoint_insert_right, disjoint_singleton_right]
        exact ⟨hMx_not_mem, hy⟩
      have h_match : G.IsMatching (Mx ∪ {e}) := by
        refine ⟨insert_subset he.mem hMx_max.subset, ?_⟩
        rintro f hf g hg hfg
        simp only [mem_union, mem_singleton_iff] at hf hg
        obtain (rfl | hf) := hf <;> obtain (rfl | hg) := hg
        · contradiction
        · rw [he.V]
          exact (this.symm.mono_left (hMx_max.disjoint hg hg rfl).le_bot).disjoint_of_subset_right (singleton_subset_iff.2 hf)
        · rw [he.V]
          exact (this.symm.mono_left (hMx_max.disjoint hf hf rfl).le_bot).disjoint_of_subset_right (singleton_subset_iff.2 hg)
        · exact hMx_max.disjoint hf hg hfg
      have := hMx_max.max _ h_match
      rw [encard_union_eq, encard_singleton] at this
      · exact not_le_of_lt (encard_lt_add_one hMx_max.toIsMatching.edgeFinite.finite) this
      · simpa using he.mem_edge_iff.not.2 (fun h ↦ hne (h.1.trans h.2.symm))

    have h_rk : M.eRk (M.E \ {x, y}) = M.eRank - 1 := by
      apply le_antisymm
      · refine (M.eRk_le_of_subset_basis _ (diff_subset_diff_left hMx_max.subset) ?_).trans_eq ?_
        · rw [diff_diff, insert_eq_of_mem hy_mem, singleton_union, pair_comm]
          exact subset_diff_singleton hMx_max.subset hMx_not_mem
        · rw [encard_diff_singleton hy_mem, hMx_max.encard, tsub_add_cancel_of_le (one_le_encard_iff_nonempty.2 ⟨y, hy_mem⟩)]
          rfl
      · refine le_of_not_lt fun hlt ↦ ?_
        obtain ⟨I, hI⟩ := M.exists_basis (M.E \ {x, y})
        have hI_card : I.encard = M.eRank := by
          rwa [hI.2.encard, ← not_lt, ← tsub_le_iff_right, le_top, true_and] at hlt
        obtain ⟨MI, hMI, hMI_sub⟩ := hI.1
        have h_sub : V(G, MI) ⊆ V(G) \ {x, y} := hMI_sub.trans hI.2.subset
        have hxMI : x ∉ V(G, MI) := not_mem_subset h_sub (not_mem_diff_of_mem (mem_singleton _))
        have hyMI : y ∉ V(G, MI) := not_mem_subset h_sub (mem_diff_singleton.not.2 rfl)
        have h_match : G.IsMatching (MI ∪ {e}) := by
          refine ⟨insert_subset he.mem hMI.subset, ?_⟩
          rintro f hf g hg hfg
          simp only [mem_union, mem_singleton_iff] at hf hg
          obtain (rfl | hf) := hf <;> obtain (rfl | hg) := hg
          · contradiction
          · rw [he.V]
            exact (disjoint_of_subset_left (singleton_subset_iff.2 hf) hMI_sub).mono_right (by simp [he.V, hxMI, hyMI])
          · rw [he.V]
            exact (disjoint_of_subset_left (singleton_subset_iff.2 hg) hMI_sub).mono_right (by simp [he.V, hxMI, hyMI])
          · exact hMI.disjoint hf hg hfg
        have := (h_in x).1.max _ h_match
        rw [encard_union_eq, encard_singleton] at this
        · refine not_le_of_lt (encard_lt_add_one hMI.edgeFinite.finite) (this.trans_eq ?_)
          rw [hMI.isMaxMatching.encard, hI_card]
          · exact hMI.isMaxMatching_of_vertex_subset hMI_sub
        · simpa using he.mem_edge_iff.not.2 (fun h ↦ hne (h.1.trans h.2.symm))

    refine ⟨?_, ?_⟩
    · rw [M.isFlat_iff_closure_self, subset_antisymm_iff, and_iff_right (M.subset_closure _),
        diff_pair, subset_diff, subset_diff, and_iff_right (M.closure_subset_ground _)]
      refine ⟨⟨fun hx ↦ ?_, fun hy ↦ ?_⟩, ⟨fun hx ↦ hne (mem_singleton_iff.1 hx).symm, fun hy ↦ hne (mem_singleton_iff.1 hy)⟩⟩
      · have hr : M.eRk (M.E \ {x, y} ∪ {x}) = M.eRank := by
          rw [union_singleton, insert_diff_singleton, remove_diff_singleton]
          exact (M.noColoop h_in hadj.snd_mem).eRk_diff_eq
        rw [M.mem_closure_iff_eRk_add_one_eq, hr, h_rk] at hx
        simpa using hx
      · have hr : M.eRk (M.E \ {x, y} ∪ {y}) = M.eRank := by
          rw [union_singleton, insert_diff_singleton, diff_remove_eq_diff]
          exact (M.noColoop h_in hadj.fst_mem).eRk_diff_eq
        rw [M.mem_closure_iff_eRk_add_one_eq, hr, h_rk] at hy
        simpa using hy
    · rw [M.covby_iff_eRk_eq_add_one, h_rk, diff_pair, insert_diff_singleton, remove_diff_singleton]
      · exact ⟨(M.noColoop h_in hadj.snd_mem).eRk_diff_eq, by simp⟩
      · rw [M.isFlat_iff_closure_self] at *; exact M.closure_subset_ground _
      · exact M.subset_closure _
  exact M.series_iff_isCocircuit.2 ⟨h_cocircuit, hne⟩
